mapper.select: SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.user_id, o.merchant_id, m.merchant_name, o.status, o.order_time, o.checkout_time, o.pay_method, o.pay_status, o.amount, o.delivery_fee, o.pack_amount, o.total_amount, o.remark, o.phone, o.address, o.consignee, o.estimated_delivery_time, o.delivery_time, o.tableware_number FROM orders o LEFT JOIN merchant m ON o.merchant_id = m.id WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber} AND o.user_id = #{userId}
